module.name: CDS Hooks Module
module.author: OpenMRS
module.description: Exposes OpenMRS as a CDS-Hooks 2.0 service host. The first service bundled is a drug-allergy alert via SNOMED CT.

globalProperty.description: Base FHIR URL of the SNOMED CT terminology server (Snowstorm or compatible)
FHIR system URI for SNOMED CT codes

Source for parent-child / subsumption lookups: "snowstorm" (live FHIR $lookup/$subsumes, default), "referenceMap" (local concept_reference_term_map edges — e.g. RxClass NUI/CUI class relationships loaded via Initializer, no terminology server required), or "both" (reference map first, Snowstorm as confirmation; any positive ancestry answer wins).

Comma-separated reference codes too broad to anchor a class match. A class match whose matched ancestor is one of these is suppressed to avoid alert fatigue (defaults are the SNOMED roots Substance, Pharmaceutical/biologic product, Medicinal product, Drug or medicament). Leave empty to fall back to the built-in defaults.
TTL in seconds for cached terminology lookups (causative agents, active ingredients, subsumption results)
Maximum entries per terminology cache (attribute lookups, subsumption pairs). Bounds JVM memory under sustained traffic; LRU eviction once exceeded.
HMAC secret used to verify HS256 bearer-token signatures on /ws/cds-services/*. Leave empty to disable bearer-token auth (clients can still authenticate via session cookies or basic auth).
If set, bearer tokens must carry this value as their iss claim. Leave empty to skip issuer validation.
